Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Justin Goodman, Esq. for Defendant; no appearance by Plaintiff. Irina D'Amato, Wife of Plaintiff Tony D'Amato present in courtroom. Court orders case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance by self-represented plaintiff. Irina D'Amato appeared in court on behalf of her husband, Tony D'Amato, to report on the status on her husband's illness. Appearance by Justin A. Goodman, Esq. for defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-29-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. The Court ordered that there will be no further continuances of the Order to Show Cause. Proceedings not reported. (610)
